required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建清明香倒计时与沈家三人同帧反应的电影参考画面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 清明香、冷白烟线、检查桌裂缝和旧木纹
composition_layers.midground: 白册官吏的手、白册边缘和桌面制度道具
composition_layers.background: 沈维桑、罗青禾、沈照眠三人分层反应和村民压力

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.
production_metadata.display_name: SC004-SH009 首帧参考帧

reference_inputs.display_name: 第01集整体风格与材质板
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定整体画风、材质、光线、低魔边界和短剧首秒可读构图。

reference_inputs.display_name: 第01集横屏宽屏构图与局部因果板
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定整体画风、材质、光线、低魔边界和短剧首秒可读构图。

reference_inputs.display_name: 残阳坳村口封锁地理场景卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定空间地理、入口出口、动作区、主道具位置、材料和天气光线。

reference_inputs.display_name: 白蜡旗与封门牌道具卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定道具轮廓、尺度、材质、磨损和精确符号或文字区域。

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建药柜木缝、晏南枝眼睛、门外虫族小兵爪足的电影参考画面。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面主体：药柜木缝、晏南枝眼睛、门外虫族小兵爪足。动作状态：从药柜木缝内看出去，门外虫族小兵爪足停在门槛阴影上；晏南枝在暗格内屏住呼吸，手压月白玉片。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景聚焦药柜木缝、晏南枝眼睛，中景承接门外虫族小兵爪足，背景保留场景深度、天气、出口和制度压力；机位与运动：密闭视角近景，从柜内缝隙向外看，几乎静止，仅有呼吸微颤；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity:
硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：罗青禾抓药、药篮、药柜暗格板。动作状态：罗青禾进屋抓药，药剪和药包动作稳定；她经过药柜时不看暗格，只用低声警告柜板一响的后果。

16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景聚焦罗青禾抓药、药篮，中景承接药柜暗格板，背景保留场景深度、天气、出口和制度压力；机位与运动：室内中景并插入道具细节，柜子与门之间侧角度，安静跟随罗青禾手部动作；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。

参考图使用要求：生成前必须上传/引用 production_metadata.reference_inputs 中列出的全剧 master 图片；角色卡以角色母卡锁定身份，场景卡以场景母卡锁定空间。
只允许按本集 episode_state 改变服装、污损、道具、情绪、镜头距离、光线、天气和调度。
如果模型无法使用参考图，必须停止并标记 blocked，不能凭文字重造角色或场景。

负面提示：不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

reference_inputs.display_name: 罗青禾药屋内景与暗格场景卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定空间地理、入口出口、动作区、主道具位置、材料和天气光线。

reference_inputs.display_name: 药柜暗格与旧驿暗号道具卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定道具轮廓、尺度、材质、磨损和精确符号或文字区域。

production_metadata.reference_input_policy: Reference inputs are production metadata for the generator operator. They must be uploaded or linked as images/control layers when available, but their ids, paths, source refs, and usage notes must not be copied into model_visible_prompt.

inheritance_contract.generator_requirement: must use approved episode character/location cards and their series masters as references before producing shot frames
inheritance_contract.visible_prompt_lock: 参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
inheritance_contract.qc_rejection_rule: reject if any named character identity or location geography drifts from approved upstream assets

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建药柜底板旧驿暗号揭示的留白参考帧。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面主体：罗青禾打开药柜底板，草药灰覆盖旧木板；板面只出现浅刻痕、灰尘擦痕和不可读线控占位，不生成准确日月纹、旧驿符号或文字。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景是药柜底板、草药灰和手指尺度，中景是晏南枝暗处的手与月白冷反光，背景是药屋暗格的草药青阴影；这是静态证据揭示帧。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity:
硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹只生成留白、浅刻痕或遮罩参考，精确内容交给线控、遮罩或后合成，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、随机可读册页文字、随机旧驿符号或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 药柜底板、草药灰、浅刻线控占位和罗青禾手指
composition_layers.midground: 晏南枝暗处的手、月白玉片冷反光和药柜边缘
composition_layers.background: 草药青暗光、药柜暗格和门外冷白压力

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建罗青禾、药柜暗格、门外封门奴兵的电影参考画面。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面主体：罗青禾、药柜暗格、门外封门奴兵。动作状态：罗青禾把底板压回去，声音更低：皇旗一露，残阳坳就是反寨；门外封门奴兵敲门，叉矛影落在药柜上。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景聚焦罗青禾、药柜暗格，中景承接门外封门奴兵，背景保留场景深度、天气、出口和制度压力；机位与运动：室内中景转向门影，从柜侧看向门，从罗青禾快速转焦到门影；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

copy_ready.chatgpt_image_prompt:
创建罗青禾、药柜暗格、门外封门奴兵的电影参考画面。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：罗青禾、药柜暗格、门外封门奴兵。动作状态：罗青禾把底板压回去，声音更低：皇旗一露，残阳坳就是反寨；门外封门奴兵敲门，叉矛影落在药柜上。

16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景聚焦罗青禾、药柜暗格，中景承接门外封门奴兵，背景保留场景深度、天气、出口和制度压力；机位与运动：室内中景转向门影，从柜侧看向门，从罗青禾快速转焦到门影；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。

参考图使用要求：生成前必须上传/引用 production_metadata.reference_inputs 中列出的全剧 master 图片；角色卡以角色母卡锁定身份，场景卡以场景母卡锁定空间。
只允许按本集 episode_state 改变服装、污损、道具、情绪、镜头距离、光线、天气和调度。
如果模型无法使用参考图，必须停止并标记 blocked，不能凭文字重造角色或场景。

负面提示：不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.
production_metadata.display_name: SC006-SH001 首帧参考帧

reference_inputs.display_name: 第01集整体风格与材质板
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定整体画风、材质、光线、低魔边界和短剧首秒可读构图。

reference_inputs.display_name: 第01集横屏宽屏构图与局部因果板
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定整体画风、材质、光线、低魔边界和短剧首秒可读构图。

reference_inputs.display_name: 残阳坳旧井检查桌场景卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定空间地理、入口出口、动作区、主道具位置、材料和天气光线。

reference_inputs.display_name: 白蜡旗与封门牌道具卡
reference_inputs.lock_usage: 锁定道具轮廓、尺度、材质、磨损和精确符号或文字区域。

production_metadata.reference_input_policy: Reference inputs are production metadata for the generator operator. They must be uploaded or linked as images/control layers when available, but their ids, paths, source refs, and usage notes must not be copied into model_visible_prompt.

inheritance_contract.generator_requirement: must use approved episode character/location cards and their series masters as references before producing shot frames
inheritance_contract.visible_prompt_lock: 参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
inheritance_contract.qc_rejection_rule: reject if any named character identity or location geography drifts from approved upstream assets

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建旧驿暗号底板被摆上检查桌的证据参考帧。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面主体：药柜底板作为证据摆在检查桌上，草药灰、旧木裂纹和浅刻占位线清楚；旁边是白册和官吏手，旧驿暗号只保留不可读轮廓，不生成准确符号。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景是旧木底板和草药灰，中景是白册、官吏手和检查桌裂缝，背景是旧井旁被赶拢的村民；这是静态证物上桌帧。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity:
硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹只生成留白、浅刻痕或遮罩参考，精确内容交给线控、遮罩或后合成，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、随机可读册页文字、随机旧驿符号或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 药柜底板、草药灰、浅刻占位线和旧木裂纹
composition_layers.midground: 白册、白册官吏手部和检查桌裂缝
composition_layers.background: 旧井边村民、奴兵封锁和午后土褐村口

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹只生成留白、浅刻痕或遮罩参考，精确内容交给线控、遮罩或后合成，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。

参考图使用要求：生成前必须上传/引用 production_metadata.reference_inputs 中列出的全剧 master 图片；角色卡以角色母卡锁定身份，场景卡以场景母卡锁定空间。
只允许按本集 episode_state 改变服装、污损、道具、情绪、镜头距离、光线、天气和调度。
如果模型无法使用参考图，必须停止并标记 blocked，不能凭文字重造角色或场景。

负面提示：不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、随机可读册页文字、随机旧驿符号或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 白册纸面、空白儿童记录区、蜡笔针和淡白虫蜡纹
composition_layers.midground: 草药袋边缘、官吏袖口和检查桌木纹
composition_layers.background: 旧井旁人群、奴兵压力和沈照眠被拉出的空间

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols

output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

只允许按本集 episode_state 改变服装、污损、道具、情绪、镜头距离、光线、天气和调度。

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建白翳翻新页、沈照眠被拉出半步、沈维桑扣弦的电影参考画面。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 画面主体：白翳翻新页、沈照眠被拉出半步、沈维桑扣弦。动作状态：白翳翻到新页，说先从孩子开始；奴兵把沈照眠拉出半步，草药袋晃起，沈维桑拇指扣住弓弦。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景聚焦白翳翻新页、沈照眠被拉出半步，中景承接沈维桑扣弦，背景保留场景深度、天气、出口和制度压力；机位与运动：中景对峙并插入手部细节，孩子在前景，白翳压在高位背景，侧面插入沈维桑，缓慢收紧推进；光照、天气、时间和画面方向必须可读，不能做成透明背景、设定板背景或孤立摆拍。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity:
硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹必须使用线控、遮罩或后合成参考，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: primary readable action, hands, props, threshold, or character beat required by the shot
composition_layers.midground: supporting characters, set geometry, blocking line, or institutional pressure source
composition_layers.background: location depth, weather/time, exits, walls, crowd pressure, or environmental continuity anchors

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

画面主体：沈维桑拇指扣住猎弓弦，弓弦绷紧但箭未离弦；沈照眠被拉出半步在中景，罗青禾隔人群给出极轻摇头的制止眼神。

16:9电影参考画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景极近景是绷紧弓弦和沈维桑拇指，中景分出罗青禾与沈照眠，背景是旧井检查桌、白册和白翳的制度压力；这是首帧，必须保持将出未出的紧绷状态。

硬锁：随附角色、场景、道具、服装和风格参考图用于锁定脸型体态、服装材质、空间地理、道具尺度、低魔边界和动作因果；白册、旁注、旧驿暗号、日月残纹、徽记和文字类痕迹只生成留白、浅刻痕或遮罩参考，精确内容交给线控、遮罩或后合成，不让模型随机造字。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。

参考图使用要求：生成前必须上传/引用 production_metadata.reference_inputs 中列出的全剧 master 图片；角色卡以角色母卡锁定身份，场景卡以场景母卡锁定空间。
只允许按本集 episode_state 改变服装、污损、道具、情绪、镜头距离、光线、天气和调度。
如果模型无法使用参考图，必须停止并标记 blocked，不能凭文字重造角色或场景。

负面提示：不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要透明背景、孤立卡片背景、错误阵营服制、随机文字、随机徽记、随机可读册页文字、随机旧驿符号或无因果的大场面。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 沈维桑拇指、绷紧猎弓弦、弓身旧木和手背紧张筋线
composition_layers.midground: 罗青禾摇头的制止眼神、沈照眠被拉出半步和人群间隙
composition_layers.background: 旧井检查桌、白册、白翳白袖和封锁线

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

production_metadata.reference_input_policy: Reference inputs are production metadata for the generator operator. They must be uploaded or linked as images/control layers when available, but their ids, paths, source refs, and usage notes must not be copied into model_visible_prompt.

inheritance_contract.generator_requirement: must use approved episode character/location cards and their series masters as references before producing shot frames
inheritance_contract.visible_prompt_lock: 参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
inheritance_contract.qc_rejection_rule: reject if any named character identity or location geography drifts from approved upstream assets

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建SC004白册沈家疑名区域的精确覆盖参考图。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 为村口检查桌上的白册准备干净遮罩参考：纸面户名行旁保留空白旁注区、淡白虫蜡纹和蜡笔针落点；不得生成具体户名、疑名、册页文字或随机符号。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9视频控制画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景保留白册纸面、空白旁注区和蜡笔针，中景保留检查桌木纹和官吏手部尺度，背景只保留村口冷白制度光；精确文字由线控或后合成完成。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity:
硬锁：只绑定村口挂疑名镜头；白册纸张、虫蜡纹、蜡笔针和检查桌木纹必须清楚，画面不可混入药柜底板、疑童记录或白翳旁注镜头。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要让模型自行生成可读文字、册页旁注、旗帜徽记、旧驿符号、日月纹、现代标志或错误手部尺度。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 白册纸面、空白旁注区、淡白虫蜡纹和蜡笔针
composition_layers.midground: 检查桌木纹、官吏手部尺度和册页边缘
composition_layers.background: 村口冷白反光和模糊制度压力

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

copy_ready.chatgpt_image_prompt:
创建SC005药柜底板旧驿暗号区域的精确覆盖参考图。

超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。

为药柜底板准备干净遮罩参考：旧木板、草药灰、擦开的浅刻线和日月残纹占位区清楚；不得生成准确旧驿符号、日月图案、文字或随机徽记。

16:9视频控制画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景是药柜底板木纹、草药灰和浅刻占位线，中景保留罗青禾手指或晏南枝手心冷反光的尺度，背景是草药青暗光；精确符号由线控或后合成完成。

硬锁：只绑定药屋暗格揭示镜头；必须是药柜底板木面和草药灰，不可泛化成白册纸面、疑童旁注或村口检查桌。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。

参考图使用要求：生成前必须上传/引用 production_metadata.reference_inputs 中列出的全剧 master 图片；角色卡以角色母卡锁定身份，场景卡以场景母卡锁定空间。
只允许按本集 episode_state 改变服装、污损、道具、情绪、镜头距离、光线、天气和调度。
如果模型无法使用参考图，必须停止并标记 blocked，不能凭文字重造角色或场景。

负面提示：不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要让模型自行生成可读文字、册页旁注、旗帜徽记、旧驿符号、日月纹、现代标志或错误手部尺度。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 药柜底板、草药灰、浅刻占位线和旧木裂纹
composition_layers.midground: 手指尺度、月白冷反光和药柜边缘
composition_layers.background: 草药青暗光、柜内阴影和门外冷白压力

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

production_metadata.history_policy: Only final approved image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must go to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes.

production_metadata.reference_input_policy: Reference inputs are production metadata for the generator operator. They must be uploaded or linked as images/control layers when available, but their ids, paths, source refs, and usage notes must not be copied into model_visible_prompt.

inheritance_contract.generator_requirement: must use approved episode character/location cards and their series masters as references before producing shot frames
inheritance_contract.visible_prompt_lock: 参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
inheritance_contract.qc_rejection_rule: reject if any named character identity or location geography drifts from approved upstream assets

model_visible_prompt.visible_goal: 创建SC006白翳虫蜡针旁注区域的精确覆盖参考图。
model_visible_prompt.style_quality: 超写实电影级低魔东方史诗；真实身体重量、自然接触反作用、旧木、虫蜡、黑石、雪、药草、纸灰、布料和旧金属都要有可触摸的真实材质；低魔痕迹只做短促局部反应，不能替代行动因果。
model_visible_prompt.subject_content: 为白翳点住白册旁注的镜头准备干净遮罩参考：白袖、虫蜡针、户名行旁空白旁注区和淡白蜡纹清楚；不得生成“祖账未清”、旧驿文字或任何可读旁注。
model_visible_prompt.composition_motion: 16:9视频控制画面，最低分辨率3840x2160；前景是虫蜡针、白袖和白册空白旁注区，中景保留旧驿底板证物与检查桌，背景保留白翳洁净侧影和封村压迫；精确文字由线控或后合成完成。
model_visible_prompt.visible_continuity:
硬锁：只绑定白翳把疑名升级为逆案的镜头；必须出现白翳白袖或虫蜡针，不可泛化成药柜底板或沈照眠疑童记录。

参考帧继承硬锁：画面中的具名角色必须继承已批准角色母卡和本集状态卡，画面中的地点必须继承已批准场景母卡和本集场景卡；参考帧只调整镜头、调度、光线和动作，不允许替换角色身份或重造空间。
model_visible_prompt.negative_prompt: 不要现代服饰、现代建筑、枪械、科幻界面、水印、乱码文字、塑料感、网红脸、过度磨皮、漂浮慢动作、僵硬摆拍、随机徽记或随机文字。不要让模型自行生成可读文字、册页旁注、旗帜徽记、旧驿符号、日月纹、现代标志或错误手部尺度。

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather, and time of day visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: 白翳虫蜡针、白袖、白册空白旁注区和淡白蜡纹
composition_layers.midground: 旧驿底板证物、检查桌和册页边缘
composition_layers.background: 白翳洁净侧影、旧井人群和封村冷白光

qc_checks: 16:9 canvas, minimum 3840x2160
foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, weather/time, screen direction, and action state are readable
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 3840x2160 px; required for landscape scene/video composition use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

dispatch_readiness.note: User requested first-episode image generation after global assets were completed.
